pr.title: Various gr matches, finish grTest and link
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched a cluster of small stage/ground functions, especially Old Kongo, Old Pupupu, Zebes Route, Ice Mountain, and finished grTest enough to switch it from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py. The decomp.dev bot reported 14 new function matches, +1776 matched-code bytes, and +1520 linked-code bytes, with matched code rising to 37.25% and linked code to 25.22%. The PR also updated GALE01 symbol metadata heavily, mostly correcting local/global scopes, local compiler-style names, and object sizes/labels needed for cleaner linking.
what_changed: Changed configure.py so melee/gr/grtest.c is built as Object(Matching) instead of Object(NonMatching), completing and linking grTest according to the PR title.

Implemented Old Kongo helpers/callbacks including grOldKongo_8020F618, grOldKongo_8020F6BC, and grOldKongo_80210788. The new code uses GET_GROUND(gobj), grAnime_801C8138(gobj, gp->map_id, 0), Ground_801C2FE0, lb_800115F4, and a Vec3 y-position comparison obtained through lb_8000B1CC.

Implemented Old Pupupu helpers/callbacks including grOldPupupu_80210888, grOldPupupu_8021099C, grOldPupupu_80210BC0, grOldPupupu_80210C34, and grOldPupupu_80211CA8. The code calls grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(NULL), grAnime_801C8138, lb_800115F4, grAnime_801C83D0/Ground_801C4A08, and the same Vec3 y-position test pattern as Old Kongo.

Updated Old Kongo and Old Pupupu headers from broad UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations to more precise bool, void, HSD_GObj*, Vec3*, int, and HSD_JObj* prototypes, adding required platform/baselib/dolphin includes.

Adjusted grTest StageData initialization by appending a final value 13, changed object access from gobj->hsd_obj to GET_JOBJ(gobj), added PAD_STACK to matched functions, used float-suffixed constants and compound assignments, and changed the OSReport source line constant from 0x35C to 209.
Matched grTest_80206E30, grTest_80207044, and grTest_802071C4 according to the bot report, finishing the unit enough for matching configuration.
Matched grIceMt_801F7EE8 by adding PAD_STACK(8) before existing calls to grIceMt_801F98A8(arg0) and Ground_801C2FE0(arg0).
Matched grZebesRoute_8020B348 and grZebesRoute_8020B384 with the recurring GET_GROUND/map_id/grAnime_801C8138 pattern.

Reworked many config/GALE01/symbols.txt entries: numerous SDK/debug/VI/PAD symbols and data objects were changed from global to local, some local data/string constants were renamed to @number or name$number compiler-style names, label aliases such as ...data.0 and ...bss.0 were added, and several object sizes/scopes were corrected.
smart_moves: Used existing stage callback idioms rather than overcomplicating small functions: GET_GROUND(gobj), pull gp->map_id, then call grAnime_801C8138(gobj, gp->map_id, 0). The same pattern appears in Old Kongo, Old Pupupu, and Zebes Route.

Kept trivial callback predicates as explicit bool functions returning false but corrected their HSD_GObj* parameter types, which helps function pointer tables and callbacks match without inventing behavior.
For the Vec3 comparison callbacks, preserved the branch-shaped true/false return after lb_8000B1CC instead of simplifying too aggressively; this is often important for matching codegen.
Used PAD_STACK(8) and PAD_STACK(16) in narrow places where stack shape, not semantic logic, was the blocker for matching.
Switched grTest from direct gobj->hsd_obj access to GET_JOBJ(gobj), aligning with project helper macros and likely matching expected casts/access patterns.
Corrected symbol scopes and local constant naming in symbols.txt in the same PR as the code matches, preventing newly linked code from depending on stale global/local symbol assumptions.
decomp_lessons: Small stage modules often yield multiple matches from repeating callback patterns: animation setup via grAnime_801C8138, process/update calls via Ground_801C2FE0, and simple false-return callbacks with the correct HSD_GObj* signature.

When a unit is nearly complete, linking may require both code fixes and symbol-map hygiene. In this PR, grTest became Matching only after code changes and large symbols.txt scope/name/size corrections.
Do not assume raw HSD_GObj object fields are the best match; project macros such as GET_GROUND and GET_JOBJ can better express the expected codegen and type flow.
Stack padding macros are legitimate matching tools for tiny functions where the functional body is already clear, as shown by grIceMt_801F7EE8 and grTest functions.

Use float literals with f suffix and compound assignments when the assembly suggests single-precision operations; grTest changed casts like (float) 0.0 and additions/subtractions into 0.0f and +=/-= forms.
Header precision matters for stage callbacks: replacing UNK_PARAMS with HSD_GObj*, Vec3*, and HSD_JObj* enables cleaner callsites and function-pointer compatibility.
Symbol scopes should reflect actual linkage. Many SDK/debug/VI/PAD and data objects were moved from global to local, while a few exceptions such as Hu_IsStub and ErrorTable were made global.
naming_conventions: Unidentified stage functions continue to use module_address names such as grOldKongo_80210788, grOldPupupu_80211CA8, grZebesRoute_8020B348, and grTest_802071C4.
Compiler-local constants and strings in symbols.txt use @number names, for example @138, @180, @217, @416 through @425, and @519 through @524.
Local static-style duplicates may use a dollar suffix, for example gm_803DA788$93, archive$185, cmdTypeAndStatus$83, and message$330.
Section-local labels are represented with names such as ...data.0 and ...bss.0 when a label alias is needed at the same address as an object.

Stage global data names keep the module prefix where the symbol is believed global, such as grTe_803E5764 and grTe_803E5708, while local constants formerly named with module prefixes were converted to @number names.
Callback prototypes in headers prefer concrete types over UNK_PARAMS once known: bool func(HSD_GObj*), void func(HSD_GObj*), and bool func(Vec3*, int, HSD_JObj*).
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added PAD_STACK(8) to grIceMt_801F7EE8 and grOldPupupu_80210C34, and PAD_STACK(16) to grTest_802071C4 to match stack layout.
Preserved explicit if/else true/false returns in grOldKongo_80210788 and grOldPupupu_80211CA8 after comparing a->y to a local Vec3 y value.
Matched recurring animation callbacks with Ground* gp = GET_GROUND(gobj); grAnime_801C8138(gobj, gp->map_id, 0);.
Used GET_JOBJ(gobj) in grTest_80206E30 instead of assigning hsd_obj directly, likely influencing casts/register use.
Changed grTest float operations to single-precision literals and -=/+= forms: 0.0f, -1.2217305f, 1.2217305f, and 0.08726646f.
Adjusted OSReport line-number literal in grTest_80207044 to 209, showing that debug string/report constants can be part of exact matching.

Corrected symbols.txt object sizes and inserted local labels to split/identify adjacent data correctly, for example grTe_803E56B8 size 0x4E plus ...data.0 and grTe_803E5764 size 0x34 with nearby local strings.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the PR slice.

The decomp.dev bot reported 14 new matches: grOldKongo_80210788, grOldPupupu_80211CA8, grOldPupupu_80210C34, grZebesRoute_8020B348, grZebesRoute_8020B384, grOldKongo_8020F618, grOldPupupu_8021099C, grTest_802071C4, grOldKongo_8020F6BC, grOldPupupu_80210888, grOldPupupu_80210BC0, grTest_80206E30, grIceMt_801F7EE8, and grTest_80207044.
Bot metrics: matched code 37.25% (+0.05%, +1776 bytes) and linked code 25.22% (+0.04%, +1520 bytes).
follow_up_queries: Find other stage files with callbacks that only need GET_GROUND(gobj) plus grAnime_801C8138(gobj, gp->map_id, 0).
Search for remaining grOldKongo and grOldPupupu UNK_PARAMS declarations that can be safely narrowed to HSD_GObj* or Vec3/HSD_JObj callback signatures.
Audit remaining NonMatching stage units in configure.py that may be close to switching to Matching after small PAD_STACK and symbol-scope fixes.
Review symbols.txt global data/string entries near stage modules to identify local @number constants that should not be exported globally.
Look for functions comparing Vec3 y positions after lb_8000B1CC where explicit branch-shaped bool returns may be needed for matching.
